mapper.update:
update home_banner
ban_url = #{data.banUrl},
type = #{data.type},
url = #{data.url},
status = #{data.status},
name = #{data.name},
nick_name = #{data.nickName},
sort_type = #{data.SortType},
sort = #{data.sort},
update_time = now(),
where id = #{data.id} AND banner_type = #{data.bannerType} AND delete_time is null
mapper.select: SELECT id, ban_url, type, url, status, name, nick_name, sort_type, banner_type, sort, create_time, update_time FROM home_banner WHERE status = 1 AND delete_time IS NULL AND sort_type = 0 AND banner_type = 0 ORDER BY banner_type ASC, sort ASC, id DESC

SELECT id, ban_url, type, url, status, name, nick_name, sort_type, banner_type, sort, create_time, update_time FROM home_banner WHERE status = 1 AND delete_time IS NULL AND sort_type = 0 AND banner_type = 1 ORDER BY banner_type ASC, sort ASC, id DESC
